title: Model Search Request
description: JSON record carrying a remote-model search query, optionally restricted by architecture.
documentation:
## Purpose
Input record for `cap:op=search-models`. Drives the wizard's first page: the user enters a query, the calling cap forwards its `supported_model_types` set as `architectures`, and the response is pre-filtered to runnable models.

## When to use
Whenever a cap needs to drive a model-picker UI against a remote repository. Wire the cap's `supported_model_types` into the `architectures` field so the user cannot select an incompatible model.

## Notes
- `architectures` is the structural architecture set (`config.json` `model_type`), not pipeline tags.
- An empty `architectures` array applies no architecture restriction.
- `cursor` carries the pagination state from a previous response's `next_cursor`.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

sort.description: Sort order (one of: trending, downloads, likes, recent).

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.

architectures.description: Architecture identifiers (config.json model_type) to restrict the result set to.
